parameters.query:
=UPDATE public.pending_orders
SET status = 'processing', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.pending_order_id }}'
AND status = 'awaiting_confirmation'
RETURNING order_id, status;

assignments.name: confirmation_message
assignments.value: Your order is already being confirmed. Please wait a moment and then track your order.

parameters.query:
=BEGIN;

INSERT INTO public.order_summary (
  order_id, chat_id, store_id, shipping_address,
  subtotal_before_discounts, total_discount_applied,
  final_order_total, applied_order_level_promo_ids,
  order_details_json
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order_id }}',
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  {{ $json.store_id }},
  '{{ $json.shipping_address_sql }}',
  {{ $json.subtotal_before_discounts }},
  {{ $json.total_discount_applied }},
  {{ $json.final_order_total }},
  '{{ $json.applied_order_level_promo_ids_sql }}',
  '{{ $json.order_details_json_safe }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO NOTHING;

WITH items AS (
  SELECT value AS item
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ $json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb->'items_in_final_order')
), order_items AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.order_id }}'::text AS order_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint AS user_id,
    COALESCE(item->>'original_name', item->>'name', 'item') AS name,
    item->>'sku' AS sku,
    GREATEST((item->>'quantity')::numeric, 0) AS quantity,
    GREATEST((item->>'unit_price')::numeric, 0) AS unit_price
  FROM items
)
INSERT INTO public.orders (
  order_id, user_id, name, sku, quantity, unit_price, status
)
SELECT
  order_id,
  user_id,
  name,
  sku,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  'confirmed'
FROM order_items
WHERE sku IS NOT NULL
  AND sku <> ''
  AND quantity > 0
ON CONFLICT (order_id, sku) DO NOTHING;

WITH qty_by_sku AS (
  SELECT
    item->>'sku' AS sku,
    SUM(GREATEST((item->>'quantity')::numeric, 0)) AS qty
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ $json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb->'items_in_final_order') AS item
  GROUP BY item->>'sku'
)
UPDATE public.inventory i
SET
  stock = GREATEST(0, i.stock - q.qty),
  is_active = CASE WHEN (i.stock - q.qty) <= 0 THEN false ELSE i.is_active END
FROM qty_by_sku q
WHERE i.sku = q.sku;

UPDATE public.pending_orders
SET status = 'confirmed', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.pending_order_id }}'
AND status IN ('processing', 'awaiting_confirmation');

DELETE FROM public.cart_items
WHERE cart_id IN (
  SELECT cart_id FROM public.carts
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.chat_id }}
  AND status = 'active'
);

UPDATE public.carts
SET status = 'checked_out'
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.chat_id }}
AND status = 'active';

COMMIT;
SELECT 'committed'::text AS txn_status;

=UPDATE public.pending_orders
SET status = 'processing', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.pending_order_id }}'
AND status = 'awaiting_confirmation'
RETURNING order_id, status;

assignments.name: confirmation_message
assignments.value: Your order is already being confirmed. Please wait a moment and then track your order.
